TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: liman¬∑falanke¬∑baomu kakiliman liman¬∑falanke¬∑baomu(Amuhuwan: Lyman Frank Baum, 1856 mihcaan limaay a bulad sabaw lima a demiad tanga sa 1919 mihcaan limaay a bulad enemay a demiad), singangan aca tu fukelian ¬∑ baobo, u Amuhuwan ku misulitay,mikikiay,nisulitay tu aadihan a sasulitan, namasacacay nisanga tu aadihan. nilacul "langdaway a kakiliman"(The Wonderful Wizard of Oz, 1900 mihcaan, singangan aca tu "nidimuday a kakididaan","u mapalaway a kakididaan")u sakasengan nu Amuhuwan u misulitat a aadihan nu wawa. kina cudad han tu malaaadihan "langdaway a kakiliman"(1939 mihcaan). i "langdaway a kakiliman" u sakanamuhan tu ci nida, misanga aca ci nida tu malcacaday a sasulitan sabaw sepat a sapicudad. u sayaway nida a nisulitan tu nu wawa a sulit"nu gacuway a kukung"(Mother Goose in Prose,1897 mihcaan), yani kaudip nida makaala tu limaay a bataan kuni sulitan nida.
S.PHON: r~…ĺiman*far~…ĺank…ô*baomu kakir~…ĺiman r~…ĺiman*far~…ĺank…ô*baomu(amuńßuwan: r~…ĺjman frank baum, **** mińß ¶aan r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad sabaw r~…ĺima a d…ômiad taŇča sa **** mińß ¶aan r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ômaj a d…ômiad), siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu fuk…ôr~…ĺian * baobo, u amuńßuwan ku misur~…ĺitaj,mikikiaj,nisur~…ĺitaj tu aadińßan a sasur~…ĺitan, namasa ¶a ¶aj nisaŇča tu aadińßan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ "r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a kakir~…ĺiman"(tńß…ô wond…ôrfur~…ĺ wizard of oz, **** mińß ¶aan, siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu "nidimudaj a kakididaan","u mapar~…ĺawaj a kakididaan")u sakas…ôŇčan nu amuńßuwan u misur~…ĺitat a aadińßan nu wawa. kina ¶udad ńßan tu mar~…ĺaaadińßan "r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a kakir~…ĺiman"(**** mińß ¶aan). i "r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a kakir~…ĺiman" u sakanamuńßan tu ¶i nida, misaŇča a ¶a ¶i nida tu mar~…ĺ ¶a ¶adaj a sasur~…ĺitan sabaw s…ôpat a sapi ¶udad. u sajawaj nida a nisur~…ĺitan tu nu wawa a sur~…ĺit"nu ga ¶uwaj a kukuŇč"(motńß…ôr goos…ô in pros…ô,**** mińß ¶aan), jani kaudip nida makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺimaaj a bataan kuni sur~…ĺitan nida.
S.FORM: liman¬∑falanke¬∑baomu kakiliman liman¬∑falanke¬∑baomu(Amuhuwan: Lyman Frank Baum, 1856 mihcaan limaay a bulad sabaw lima a demiad tanga sa 1919 mihcaan limaay a bulad enemay a demiad), singangan aca tu fukelian ¬∑ baobo, u Amuhuwan ku misulitay,mikikiay,nisulitay tu aadihan a sasulitan, namasacacay nisanga tu aadihan. nilacul "langdaway a kakiliman"(The Wonderful Wizard of Oz, 1900 mihcaan, singangan aca tu "nidimuday a kakididaan","u mapalaway a kakididaan")u sakasengan nu Amuhuwan u misulitat a aadihan nu wawa. kina cudad han tu malaaadihan "langdaway a kakiliman"(1939 mihcaan). i "langdaway a kakiliman" u sakanamuhan tu ci nida, misanga aca ci nida tu malcacaday a sasulitan sabaw sepat a sapicudad. u sayaway nida a nisulitan tu nu wawa a sulit"nu gacuway a kukung"(Mother Goose in Prose,1897 mihcaan), yani kaudip nida makaala tu limaay a bataan kuni sulitan nida.
S.PHON: r~…ĺiman*far~…ĺank…ô*baomu kakir~…ĺiman r~…ĺiman*far~…ĺank…ô*baomu(amuńßuwan: r~…ĺjman frank baum, **** mińß ¶aan r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad sabaw r~…ĺima a d…ômiad taŇča sa **** mińß ¶aan r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ômaj a d…ômiad), siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu fuk…ôr~…ĺian * baobo, u amuńßuwan ku misur~…ĺitaj,mikikiaj,nisur~…ĺitaj tu aadińßan a sasur~…ĺitan, namasa ¶a ¶aj nisaŇča tu aadińßan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ "r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a kakir~…ĺiman"(tńß…ô wond…ôrfur~…ĺ wizard of oz, **** mińß ¶aan, siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu "nidimudaj a kakididaan","u mapar~…ĺawaj a kakididaan")u sakas…ôŇčan nu amuńßuwan u misur~…ĺitat a aadińßan nu wawa. kina ¶udad ńßan tu mar~…ĺaaadińßan "r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a kakir~…ĺiman"(**** mińß ¶aan). i "r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a kakir~…ĺiman" u sakanamuńßan tu ¶i nida, misaŇča a ¶a ¶i nida tu mar~…ĺ ¶a ¶adaj a sasur~…ĺitan sabaw s…ôpat a sapi ¶udad. u sajawaj nida a nisur~…ĺitan tu nu wawa a sur~…ĺit"nu ga ¶uwaj a kukuŇč"(motńß…ôr goos…ô in pros…ô,**** mińß ¶aan), jani kaudip nida makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺimaaj a bataan kuni sur~…ĺitan nida.
